original: Dressed in nothing but her shoulder and waist-mounted coolant rigs she’s a saucy sight, but her otherwise pretty features are twisted into the cruel grin of a pyromaniac. Strapped to the backs of her shoulders are tanks of fuel, ready to be slammed home into her heavy flamer.
